stemHtml: Approaching Girona passing IAF BANOL, landing gear warning activates. You want a tower fly-by. Correct phraseology?

options.a: PAN PAN x3, Girona tower, Globeair xxx, suspect gear malfunction, request low pass.
options.b: MAYDAY x3, Girona tower, Globeair xxx, gear malfunction, request low pass.
options.c: PAN PAN x3, Girona tower, Globeair xxx, cockpit anomaly, request low pass.
options.d: PAN PAN x3, Girona tower, Globeair xxx, suspect gear malfunction, request low pass to confirm.
